comment: Sajtbyggaren OpenClaw action registry. OpenClaw is a conductor on the controlled engine, not a free agent. status: supported | partial | planned.

actions.note: Colour/font/theme -> brand/tone via theme_directives; compound colours via the stylist role + color_lexicon.
name/tagline/about/services via copyDirective; LLM-understood (copyDirectiveModel) with deterministic guards.

Mounts a sanctioned section's capability + dossier via the apply chain (router section_add -> resolve type to capability with an implementing dossier -> apply requestedCapabilities + selectedDossiers.required -> targeted render -> new immutable version). Nine sanctioned types as of 2026-06-08 (commit 4c6ba67): team, faq, trust/guarantees, reviews, gallery, pricing, hours, location (map), contact-form. VISIBLE TYPES (flipped 2026-06-09): faq and team now render VISIBLY on the local-service-business scaffold by surfacing a grounded dedicated route (/faq via render_faq, /team via render_team) through the existing wizard extra-route plumbing (apply records the wizard mustHave label on the next version's meta sidecar). appliedVisibleEffect=true ONLY on a real render: faq is grounded by construction (areas/opening-hours answers), team requires grounded company.team (an empty team stays honest mounted-but-no-content). Non-LSB scaffolds keep faq/team mount-only until their renderer set opts into wizard routes. MOUNT-ONLY (still): trust/guarantees, reviews, gallery, pricing, hours, location, contact-form mount the dossier but render no new section yet (applied=true, appliedVisibleEffect=false) — gallery/pricing/location can follow the same dedicated-route pattern next. Unknown/unsupported type (incl. hero/services/cta-banner) = honest no-op.
Reorder/move sections; needs an apply capability, not free CSS.
Read-only answer/critique from artifacts; never builds.
